name: 6.5' Tinsel Artificial Christmas Tree Christmas Silver - Wondershop™
description:
Transform your home into a winter wonderland with this Tinsel Artificial Christmas Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial Christmas tree features hinged branches with silver-tone tinsel for a sparkly look. It's also decorated with 300 LED bulbs that cast white light for a frosty, festive ambiance. Flame retardant, this faux Christmas tree features button controls to turn the lights on and off and comes with a stand for instant placement on your floor.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
